spec:
# Dashboard вҖ” Component Planning Specification

**Page:** Dashboard (`/dashboard`)
**Document Version:** 1.0
**Spec Type:** UX Component Planning
**Primary Persona:** Claims Manager

---

## 1. Component Tree

```
DashboardPage
в”ңв”Җв”Җ PageHead                                  # <title> + meta
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ title: "Dashboard вҖ” ClaimFlow"
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ AppShell
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ TopNavigation                         # global nav (external component)
в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җ DashboardLayout                           # <main> root layout container
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ DashboardPageHeader                   # <section> aria-labelledby="dashboard-heading"
    в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ PageHeading                       # <h1> "Pipeline Overview"
    в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ LiveIndicatorBadge                # "в—Ҹ Live" / last-updated timestamp
    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ KPIRow                                # <section> aria-labelledby="kpi-heading"
    в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ SectionHeading (visually-hidden)  # id="kpi-heading"
    в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ StatCard вҖ” OpenClaims             # role="link", aria-label
    в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ StatCard вҖ” FiledToday
    в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ StatCard вҖ” AvgProcessingTime
    в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ StatCard вҖ” SLACompliance
    в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ StatCardMetric               # <span> heading-1 value
    в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ StatCardLabel               # <span> body label
    в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ StatCardSubLabel            # <span> small sub-label
    в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җ StatCardTrendIndicator      # chevron + delta %
    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ ChartsRow                             # <section> aria-labelledby="charts-heading"
    в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ SectionHeading (visually-hidden)  # id="charts-heading"
    в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ClaimsStatusBarChartCard          # 8-col card
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ CardHeader
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ CardTitle               # "Claims by Status", heading-3
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ CardLastUpdated         # small, text-muted
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ HorizontalStackedBar
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ BarSegment Г— N          # role="img", aria-label, tooltip
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ BarSegmentTooltip       # z-index 1400, 400ms delay
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ StatusBarLegend
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ LegendItem Г— N          # dot + label + count
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ AccessibleDataTable         # visually-hidden sr-only
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ PriorityDonutChartCard           # 4-col card
    в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ CardHeader
    в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ CardTitle               # "Priority Breakdown", heading-3
    в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ DonutChart                  # SVG, role="img", aria-label
    в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ DonutSegment Г— 4        # hover: +4px outward expansion
    в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ DonutCenterLabel        # count heading-2 + "Claims" small
    в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ DonutSegmentTooltip     # z-index 1400, 400ms delay
    в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ PriorityLegend
    в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ LegendItem Г— 4          # swatch 12Г—12 + label + count + %
    в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җ AccessibleDataTable         # visually-hidden sr-only
    в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җ BottomRow                            # <section> aria-labelledby="detail-heading"
        в”ңв”Җв”Җ SectionHeading (visually-hidden)  # id="detail-heading"
        в”ңв”Җв”Җ RecentActivityFeedCard            # 5-col card
        в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ CardHeader
        в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ CardTitle               # "Recent Activity", heading-3
        в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ CardSubTitle            # "Last 10 status changes", small
        в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ActivityFeedList            # <ul>, max-height 480px, overflow-y auto
        в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ ActivityFeedItem Г— 10  # <li>, min-height 44px
        в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ ActivityAvatar      # 32Г—32px, radius.full, initials fallback
        в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ ActivityText        # <span> body
        в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ActorName
        в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ClaimLink       # <a> teal cta-primary вҶ’ /claims/:id
        в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ ClaimStatusBadge  # inline badge component
        в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җ ActivityTimestamp   # relative time, small, text-muted
        в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ                               # tooltip: absolute datetime on hover
        в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ ActivityFeedEmptyState      # conditional: illustration + copy
        в”Ӯ
        в””в”Җв”Җ AdjusterWorkloadTableCard       # 7-col card
            в”ңв”Җв”Җ CardHeader
            в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ CardTitle               # "Adjuster Workload", heading-3
            в”ңв”Җв”Җ WorkloadTable               # shadcn/ui Table, <caption>
            в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ TableHead
            в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ TableHeaderCell Г— 4 # scope="col", aria-sort, sortable
            в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ       # Adjuster | Active Claims | Avg Processing Time | Oldest Claim Age
            в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ TableBody
            в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җ WorkloadTableRow Г— N  # min-height 44px, alternating bg
            в”Ӯ           в”ңв”Җв”Җ AdjusterCell    # Avatar 24px + AdjusterNameLink вҶ’ /claims?adjuster=:id
            в”Ӯ           в”ңв”Җв”Җ ActiveClaimsCell
            в”Ӯ           в”ңв”Җв”Җ AvgProcessingCell
            в”Ӯ           в””в”Җв”Җ OldestClaimAgeCell  # color-coded by SLA risk threshold
            в””в”Җв”Җ WorkloadTableEmptyState     # conditional: copy
```

---

## 2. Layout Rules

### 2.1 Page Shell

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  TopNavigation (full-width, external)                                   в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ  DashboardLayout                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  max-width: 1280px | margin: 0 auto | padding: 0 24px 64px 24px        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җ DashboardPageHeader в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  "Pipeline Overview"  [в—Ҹ Live вҖ” Updated 30s ago]                   в”Ӯв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җ KPIRow в”Җв”Җ 12-col grid, gutter 24px в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ [StatCard 3col] [StatCard 3col] [StatCard 3col] [StatCard 3col]    в”Ӯв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җ ChartsRow в”Җв”Җ 12-col grid в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ [ClaimsStatusBarChartCard вҖ” 8col] [PriorityDonutChartCard вҖ” 4col]  в”Ӯв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җ BottomRow в”Җв”Җ 12-col grid в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ [RecentActivityFeedCard вҖ” 5col]  [AdjusterWorkloadTableCard вҖ” 7col]в”Ӯв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳв”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### 2.2 Grid Specification

| Property | Value | Token Source |
|---|---|---|
| Columns | 12 | `layout.grid.columns` |
| Gutter | 24px | `layout.grid.gutter` |
| Page margin | 24px (L+R) | `layout.grid.margin` |
| Max content width | 1280px | `layout.content_max_width` |
| Minimum viewport | 1024px | `layout.breakpoints.desktop` |
| Row gap (between rows) | 24px | `spacing.scale[4]` |

### 2.3 Column Span Assignments

| Component | Column Span | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Each `StatCard` | 3 / 12 | Four equal cards |
| `ClaimsStatusBarChartCard` | 8 / 12 | Dominant chart |
| `PriorityDonutChartCard` | 4 / 12 | Secondary chart |
| `RecentActivityFeedCard` | 5 / 12 | Activity feed |
| `AdjusterWorkloadTableCard` | 7 / 12 | Workload table |

### 2.4 Card Internal Layout

| Property | Value | Token Source |
|---|---|---|
| Internal padding | 24px all sides | `spacing.scale[4]` |
| Border radius | 10px | `borders.radius.medium` |
| Background | `#FFFFFF` | `colors.semantic.surface-primary` |
| Elevation (default) | Level 1 shadow | `elevation.levels[1]` |
| Elevation (hover вҖ” cards) | Level 2 shadow | `elevation.levels[2]` |

### 2.5 Internal Component Layout Rules

**StatCard internal layout:**
```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  [Label вҖ” heading-3 / body]   [Trend вҶ‘ +2%] в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [Primary Metric вҖ” heading-1]                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [Sub-label вҖ” small, text-secondary]          в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```
- Padding: 24px
- Metric and label stack vertically, `gap: 4px`
- Trend indicator floats top-right, `position: absolute` or flex `justify-between` on header row

**ActivityFeedItem internal layout:**
```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ [Avatar 32px]  [Action text вҖ” body]  [Time]  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```
- `display: flex`, `align-items: center`, `gap: 12px`
- Minimum row height: 44px (`touch_targets.minimum_height`)
- Timestamp pinned right via `margin-left: auto`
- Bottom border: 1px solid `border-default` (stone-300), omitted on last item

**WorkloadTable row layout:**
- `min-height: 44px` per row
- Adjuster cell: `display: flex`, `align-items: center`, `gap: 8px` (avatar + name link)
- Alternating rows: odd = `surface-primary` (#FFFFFF), even = `surface-secondary` (stone-100)

---

## 3. Token Bindings

### 3.1 Color Tokens

| Element | Token | Resolved Value |
|---|---|---|
| Page background | `background-primary` | `#FAFAF7` |
| All card backgrounds | `surface-primary` | `#FFFFFF` |
| Activity row hover / alt table rows | `surface-secondary` | `#F5F4F0` |
| Primary text (metrics, names, body) | `text-primary` вҶ’ `charcoal-900` | `#1C1917` |
| Secondary text (labels, sub-labels) | `text-secondary` вҶ’ `charcoal-600` | `#57534E` |
| Muted text (timestamps, "last updated") | `text-disabled` вҶ’ `stone-300` | `#D6D3CC` |
| Claim links, adjuster name links | `cta-primary` вҶ’ `teal-600` | `#0D9488` |
| Link hover | `cta-hover` вҶ’ `teal-700` | `#0F766E` |
| Focus ring color | `border-focus` вҶ’ `teal-600` | `#0D9488` |
| Default borders (separators, dividers) | `border-default` вҶ’ `stone-300` | `#D6D3CC` |
| Error / SLA breached (15+ days) | `error` | `#DC2626` |
| Warning / SLA at-risk (8вҖ“14 days) | `warning` вҶ’ `amber-500` | `#F59E0B` |
| Success / SLA on-track (0вҖ“7 days) | `success` | `#15803D` |
| Trend indicator up | `success` | `#15803D` |
| Trend indicator down | `error` | `#DC2626` |
| Tooltip / overlay background | `overlay` | `rgba(28,25,23,0.45)` |

### 3.2 Chart Color Token Bindings

**Claims by Status вҖ” Bar Segments:**

| Status | Fill Color | Hex |
|---|---|---|
| `submitted` | blue-500 | `#3B82F6` |
| `under_review` | amber-500 | `#F59E0B` |
| `info_requested` | orange-500 | `#F97316` |
| `escalated` | purple-600 | `#9333EA` |
| `approved` | green-600 | `#16A34A` |
| `denied` | red-600 | `#DC2626` |

**Priority Distribution вҖ” Donut Segments:**

| Priority | Fill Color | Hex |
|---|---|---|
| `low` | slate-400 | `#94A3B8` |
| `medium` | amber-500 | `#F59E0B` |
| `high` | orange-500 | `#F97316` |
| `critical` | red-600 | `#DC2626` |

### 3.3 Typography Token Bindings

| Element | Token | Size / Weight / Family |
|---|---|---|
| Page heading "Pipeline Overview" | `heading-1` | 28px / 700 / DM Sans |
| Card titles ("Claims by Status", etc.) | `heading-3` | 17px / 600 / DM Sans |
| StatCard primary metric value | `heading-1` | 28px / 700 / DM Sans |
| Donut center count | `heading-2` | 22px / 600 / DM Sans |
| Body copy (activity text, table cells) | `body` | 15px / 400 / Source Sans 3 |
| Table header labels | `label` (+ uppercase letter-spacing) | 13px / 500 / Source Sans 3 |
| Sub-labels, timestamps, legend items | `small` | 12px / 400 / Source Sans 3 |
| Trend indicator delta | `label` | 13px / 500 / Source Sans 3 |

| Focus ring appearance | 150ms | `ease-out` | `motion.durations.fast` |

## 4. Responsive Breakpoints

> Per NFR, minimum supported viewport is **1024px desktop**. The specification below defines the primary desktop layout and provides graceful degradation rules for the supported range.

### 4.1 Breakpoint Definitions

| Name | Min-width | Token |
|---|---|---|
| `mobile` | 640px | `layout.breakpoints.mobile` |
| `tablet` | 768px | `layout.breakpoints.tablet` |
| `desktop` | 1024px | `layout.breakpoints.desktop` вҶҗ **minimum supported** |
| `wide` | 1440px | `layout.breakpoints.wide` |

### 4.2 Layout Behavior Per Breakpoint

#### `desktop` вҖ” 1024px to 1279px (Supported minimum)

```
KPIRow:       4 Г— 3-col cards вҶ’ still 4 across
              (columns compress; cards may be ~220px wide minimum)

ChartsRow:    Bar chart: 8-col | Donut: 4-col
              (both cards remain side-by-side; donut legend renders BELOW donut SVG)

BottomRow:    Activity Feed: 5-col | Workload Table: 7-col
              (side by side; workload table columns: hide "Avg Processing" if needed)
```

> **Overflow rule:** If viewport drops below 1024px, the layout does not collapse вҖ” a horizontal scrollbar appears at the page level. This matches the "desktop-only" NFR.

---

#### `wide` вҖ” 1440px and above

```
KPIRow:       4 Г— 3-col cards remain; max-width container centers at 1280px
              No layout change вҖ” max-width cap prevents excessive stretching

ChartsRow:    Same proportions; chart SVGs scale within their containers
              Bar chart gains more horizontal room for segment labels

BottomRow:    Same proportions; workload table can show more rows before needing scroll
```

> **Max-width enforcement:** `DashboardLayout` is capped at `1280px` and centered with `margin: 0 auto`. At 1440px+ viewports, the background fills the remaining space with `background-primary` (warm-white).

---

#### `tablet` вҖ” 768px to 1023px (Degraded, not officially supported)

> If product team confirms tablet support (per Open Question #7), apply these rules:

```
KPIRow:       4-col grid вҶ’ 2-col grid
              StatCards: 2 Г— 2 layout (each card 6/12 cols)

ChartsRow:    Stack vertically
              ClaimsStatusBarChartCard: 12-col (full width)
              PriorityDonutChartCard: 12-col (full width)
              Donut legend: renders below chart, horizontal flex

BottomRow:    Stack vertically
              RecentActivityFeedCard: 12-col (full width)
              AdjusterWorkloadTableCard: 12-col (full width)
              Workload table: hide "Avg Processing Time" column; show on horizontal scroll
```

---

#### `mobile` вҖ” below 768px (Out of scope per NFR)

> Not specified. Dashboard is desktop-only. Mobile users are redirected or shown an unsupported-viewport message.

---

### 4.3 Component-Level Responsive Rules

| Component | 1024вҖ“1279px | 1280px+ |
|---|---|---|
| `StatCard` | Min-width 200px; trend indicator wraps below label if needed | Full comfortable render |
| `HorizontalStackedBar` | Segments вүҘ 5% show inline label; others label on hover only | Segments вүҘ 3% show inline label |
| `PriorityDonutChartCard` | Legend stacks **below** donut within 4-col card | Legend stacks vertically **right** of donut if card вүҘ 360px |
| `ActivityFeedList` | max-height: 400px | max-height: 480px |
| `WorkloadTable` | All 4 columns shown; table scrolls horizontally if content overflows | All 4 columns shown comfortably |
| `BarSegmentTooltip` | Positioned above segment; flip to below if near top edge | Same |

## 5. Loading & Skeleton State Specifications

### 5.1 Skeleton Components

| Component | Skeleton Shape | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `StatCard` | Full card silhouette вҖ” 1 rect (metric, 40px tall) + 1 rect (label, 16px) + 1 rect (sub-label, 12px) | Gray shimmer, `surface-secondary` base |
| `ClaimsStatusBarChartCard` | 1 full-width rect (bar height 40px) + 3 legend rects below | Same card size |
| `PriorityDonutChartCard` | 1 circle (donut shape) + 4 legend line rects | Circle uses border-radius trick |
| `RecentActivityFeedCard` | 4 rows: circle (avatar) + 2 rects (text lines) + 1 small rect (timestamp) | 4 skeleton items, not 10 |
| `AdjusterWorkloadTableCard` | 6 rows: each row is 4 rects matching column widths | Header row is also skeleton |

### 5.2 Loading State Logic

```
Initial page load:
  вҶ’ All sections render skeletons simultaneously
  вҶ’ Data loads per endpoint; sections populate independently as each resolves
  вҶ’ If load > 2000ms: add "LoadingвҖҰ" small text below each skeleton section

Auto-refresh (every 60s):
  вҶ’ Silent data fetch; no skeleton re-render
  вҶ’ On data change: animate metric values with number-roll (280ms)
  вҶ’ Tables: update in place without re-sorting mid-session
  вҶ’ "Last updated" timestamp updates in activity feed header

Per-section error (network failure):
  вҶ’ Skeleton replaced by inline error state within that card only
  вҶ’ Error state: warning icon + "We couldn't load this data. Refresh to try again." (body, text-secondary)
  вҶ’ Retry button: `label` scale, teal cta-primary text button
  вҶ’ Full-page error (all sections fail): full-width alert banner above KPI row
```

---

## 6. Accessibility Specification Summary

### 6.1 Semantic Structure

```html
<main>
  <section aria-labelledby="kpi-heading">
    <h2 id="kpi-heading" class="sr-only">Key Performance Indicators</h2>
    <!-- 4x StatCard as role="link" -->
  </section>

  <section aria-labelledby="charts-heading">
    <h2 id="charts-heading" class="sr-only">Pipeline Charts</h2>
    <!-- Bar chart card + Donut chart card -->
  </section>

  <section aria-labelledby="detail-heading">
    <h2 id="detail-heading" class="sr-only">Pipeline Detail</h2>
    <!-- Activity feed + Workload table -->
  </section>
</main>
```

### 6.2 ARIA Role Assignments

| Component | ARIA Role / Attribute |
|---|---|
| `StatCard` | `role="link"`, `aria-label="[Label]: [Value]. Navigate to filtered claims list."` |
| Chart SVG roots | `role="img"`, `aria-label="[Chart description with data summary]"` |
| Bar segments | `role="img"`, `aria-label="[Status]: [count] claims, [pct]% of total"` |
| Donut segments | `role="img"`, `aria-label="[Priority]: [count] claims, [pct]% of total"` |
| Activity feed list | `<ul>` with each item as `<li>` |
| Activity feed row | `tabindex="0"`, `aria-label="[Actor] moved [ClaimID] to [Status], [relative time]"` |
| Workload table | `<table>` with `<caption>Adjuster Workload</caption>` |
| Table headers | `scope="col"`, sortable headers include `aria-sort="descending"` / `"ascending"` / `"none"` |
| Hidden data tables (charts) | `class="sr-only"`, `aria-hidden="false"` |

### 6.3 Keyboard Tab Order

```
1. TopNavigation (handled by nav component)
2вҖ“5.  StatCard Г— 4 (L вҶ’ R)       вҶ’ Enter: navigate to filtered claims list
6.    ClaimsStatusBarChartCard    вҶ’ Arrow keys: navigate segments
7.    PriorityDonutChartCard      вҶ’ Arrow keys: cycle segments
8вҖ“17. ActivityFeedItem Г— 10      вҶ’ Enter: navigate to /claims/:id
18+.  WorkloadTable headers       вҶ’ Enter: toggle sort
N+.   AdjusterNameLink cells      вҶ’ Enter: navigate to /claims?adjuster=:id
```

|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `StatCard` | Elevation L1, bg white | Elevation L2, border teal, cursor pointer | 2px teal ring | Pressed scale 0.98 | Skeleton shimmer | вҖ” | Show `0` value |
| `BarSegment` | Filled color, label | Tooltip visible | Segment outlined | вҖ” | Skeleton rect | Segment hidden if count=0 | вҖ” |
| `DonutSegment` | Filled color | +4px expansion, tooltip | SVG focus ring | вҖ” | Skeleton circle | Full circle one color | вҖ” |
| `ActivityFeedItem` | bg white, border bottom | bg surface-secondary | 2px teal ring | вҖ” | Skeleton rows | вҖ” | Illustration + copy |
| `WorkloadTableRow` | Alt bg colors | bg surface-secondary (on name only) | 2px teal ring on name link | вҖ” | Skeleton rows | вҖ” | Empty state copy |
| `AdjusterNameLink` | Teal text | Underline | Focus ring | вҖ” | вҖ” | вҖ” | вҖ” |
| `OldestClaimAgeCell` | Color by threshold | вҖ” | вҖ” | вҖ” | вҖ” | вҖ” | вҖ” |
| `SortableColumnHeader` | Neutral label | Teal chevron preview | Focus ring | Active chevron teal | вҖ” | вҖ” | вҖ” |

## 8. Data Contract Summary

| Component | Endpoint | Key Fields |
|---|---|---|
| All `StatCard`s | `GET /api/dashboard/pipeline` | `open_count`, `filed_today`, `avg_processing_days`, `sla_compliance_pct`, `trend_delta` |
| `ClaimsStatusBarChartCard` | `GET /api/dashboard/pipeline` | `status_counts: { submitted, under_review, info_requested, escalated, approved, denied }` |
| `PriorityDonutChartCard` | Derived from claims data | `priority_counts: { low, medium, high, critical }` |
| `RecentActivityFeedCard` | `GET /api/dashboard/activity` (or aggregated timeline) | `actor: { name, avatar_url }`, `action`, `claim_id`, `claim_number`, `new_status`, `timestamp` |
| `AdjusterWorkloadTableCard` | `GET /api/dashboard/workload` | `adjuster: { id, name, avatar_url }`, `active_claims`, `avg_processing_days`, `oldest_claim_days` |

**Auto-refresh interval:** 60 seconds (all endpoints polled simultaneously)
**Data freshness display:** `RecentActivityFeedCard` header вҶ’ `CardLastUpdated` component shows `"Updated [N] seconds ago"` in `small` / `text-muted`
